tags.note: There is no exit gate in the SE quadrant of this crossing as it would interfere with the track clearance green for the nearby traffic signal.

tags.fixme: The FRA ID of this crossing node is ambiguous -- it could be part of 750157A or 750158G, and the ENS sign only gives a CPUC ref.
tags.name: Race
tags.note: Pedestrian swing gates at this crossing are manually operated
Pedestrian swing gates at this crossing are manually operated
The pedestrian crossing here lies within the span of the vehicular gates.

tags.fixme: Anyone have a decent shot of the diverging speed restriction plaque here?
